name: dtc-mastery
description: Complete DTC brand building knowledge engine covering the full product-to-exit lifecycle across Shopify, Amazon, and TikTok Shop. 15 skills spanning product ideation, brand strategy, product development, sourcing, quality inspection, store setup, listing optimization, PPC, TikTok Shop, creator strategy, launch, pricing, external traffic, operations, and exit planning. Built from 6 extraction files covering Gretta van Riel, Jason Wong, Matt Clark, Kevin King Summit speakers, Amazon FBA courses, and TikTok Shop Mastery.
